title: Grand Dust2 Archaeological Walk
description: An educational walking tour through the legendary landmarks of de_dust2. Discover the masonry of A-Long, the tactical history of Pit, and enjoy panoramic views of the entire site from Catwalk. Perfect for first-time visitors.

title: B-Site Underground Expedition
description: Descend into the cool shadows of the Upper and Lower Tunnels. Visit the historic B-Platform, learn the secret defense strategies of 'Car', and marvel at the engineering of B-Doors. Flashlights and helmets provided.

title: Mid Doors & Catwalk Sightseeing
description: A thrilling high-exposure tour across Mid Doors, tracing the dangerous corridor of suicide-alley and climbing up the winding steps of Catwalk. Experience the tension and architectural beauty of the center map.

title: CT Spawn Sunset Highlights
description: Enjoy the golden hour over Dust2. Walk from the secure fortresses of CT Spawn, up the ramp to A-Short, and finish the day with high-end refreshments under the historical archway at goose.
